arts.ttl: Arteta: Arsenal going 'full gas' at Newcastle after 'disappointing' window
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has insisted his side are preparing to go "full gas" against Newcastle United in their Carabao Cup semi-final despite a "disappointing" end to the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Striker has scored three goals in just two games for new club after Arsenal rejected chance to sign him
Arteta 'disappointed' by lack of Arsenal signings
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has admitted his disappointment at Arsenal's failure to sign a striker in the January transfer window but believes the club need to stay "very disciplined" to remain on track.

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds splashed out on ex-Man Utd star and player who snubbed Liverpool and Arsenal
arts.sum: Wrexham have been busy in the January transfer window, adding three new faces to their ranks as Phil Parkinson's side look to secure Championship status for next season

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta confirms Dubai training camp after Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: The Gunners are repeating past successful trips, but with a few tweaks

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta ‘disappointed’ that Arsenal failed to sign a striker
arts.sum: A frustrated Arteta said he will now have to be “very flexible” with his attacking tactics.

arts.ttl: Club ‘optimistic’ of agreeing deal with Arsenal man this week – May tempt Gunners with transfer offer
arts.sum: Flamengo are optimistic about the negotiations to sign Jorginho from Arsenal and want to sign him to a pre-contract agreement in the next few days. That’s according to GOAL Brasil, who report that Flamengo are convinced Jorginho will be a standout in Brazilian football. They state that Flamengo are willing to pay a large sum The post Club ‘optimistic’ of agreeing deal with Arsenal man this week – May tempt Gunners with transfer offer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta press conference LIVE - Arsenal vs Newcastle, Transfer Deadline Day
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is set to face the media at the Sobha Realty Training Centre before Arsenal's Carabao Cup clash with Newcastle United at St. James’ Park. Arsenal have very little chance of progressing to the final after their 2-0 home defeat to Newcastle in the first leg of the semi-final.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boost as Mikel Arteta outlines Ben White injury return timeline
arts.sum: Right-back has been out since November after undergoing knee surgery
Mikel Arteta says he is disappointed by Arsenal's failure to make any signings during the winter transfer window, but praises the club's discipline.
